response.original_title: Rush: Grace Under Pressure Tour (2026, expanded)
response.overview: 2026 expanded re-issue included as a blu-ray in the Grace Under Pressure 40th Anniversary boxed set.  1. Spirit of Radio  2. Subdivisions*  3. The Body Electric*  4. The Enemy Within  5. The Weapon  6. Witch Hunt  7. New World Man  8. Between the Wheels*  9. Red Barchetta*  10. Distant Early Warning  11. Red Sector A  12. Closer to the Heart  13. Kid Gloves*  14. YYZ  15. 2112: Temples of Syrinx  16. Tom Sawyer  17. Red Lenses / Drum Solo*  18. Vital Signs  19. Finding My Way  20. In the Mood  * Restored footage in the 2026 expanded, full show version.  Original description: By 1984, Rush were becoming the world’s most popular ‘underground’ band. The world was also in a sombre mood, perhaps reflecting on George Orwell’s 1984 thoughts. Rush’s music from the Grace Under Pressure album captured this mood well, and their footage of the Maple Leaf Gardens concert in their home town Toronto on 21 September 1984 covers many of the stunning tracks from that album.
response.title: Rush: Grace Under Pressure Tour (2026, expanded)
